subject: Urgent: Production API latency spike
body:
Hi,

We're seeing a significant latency spike on the production sportsbook API since 2:00 PM UTC. P99 latency has jumped from 200ms to 1.8s. This is affecting live betting markets across all brands.

Can you investigate ASAP? The trading team is reporting timeouts on odds updates.

Thanks,
Sarah

subject: Re: Q3 ML Model Performance Review
body:
Hey,

Following up on our discussion last week about the odds recommendation model. The A/B test results are in:

- Model v2.3 shows a 12% improvement in prediction accuracy
- Latency reduced by 30ms per inference
- False positive rate down from 4.2% to 2.8%

Can we schedule a meeting to discuss the production rollout plan? I think we should target next sprint.

Best,
Mike

subject: Re: Q3 ML Model Performance Review
body:
Mike,

Great results! Let's definitely discuss the rollout. A few things I want to cover:
1. Canary deployment strategy
2. Rollback criteria
3. Monitoring dashboards

How about Thursday at 2 PM?

Cheers

subject: Question about B2B API integration
body:
Hello,

We're integrating your sportsbook API into our platform and have a few questions:

1. What's the rate limit for the /odds endpoint?
2. Do you support WebSocket connections for live odds streaming?
3. Is there a sandbox environment we can use for testing?

We're planning to go live in 3 weeks and want to make sure we're fully prepared.

Regards,
Lisa Wong
Partner Brand - Technical Lead

subject: FYI: Updated Remote Work Policy - July 2026
body:
Dear Team,

Please note the following updates to our remote work policy effective July 1, 2026:

- Hybrid schedule: minimum 2 days in office per week
- Core hours: 10 AM - 4 PM local time
- Home office equipment allowance increased to €500/year

Please review the full policy document on the intranet.

Best regards,
HR Team

subject: Sprint Review reminder - Tomorrow 10 AM
body:
Hi,

Just a reminder that our sprint review is tomorrow (Tuesday) at 10 AM CET.

Please prepare a brief demo of the email classification pipeline you've been working on. The PO wants to see the accuracy metrics and the human-in-the-loop approval flow.

Thanks,
David
